arguments.description: removeShortTextThreshold Sample text for which the total number words are less than or equal to this number will be ignored. dedupThreshold
arguments.name: The input file entry ID or the file content (as a string).

arguments.description: textFields A comma-separated list of incident field names with the text to process. You can also use "|" if you want to choose the first non-empty value from a list of fields. inputType
arguments.name: Remove emails with similarity greater than this threshold, range 0-1, where 1 is completly identical.

arguments.description: preProcessType Text pre-processing type. The default is "json". cleanHTML
arguments.name: The input type.

arguments.description: whitelistFields A comma-separate list of fields inside the JSON by which to filter. hashSeed
arguments.name: Whether to remove HTML tags. Default is "true".

arguments.description: outputFormat The output file format. outputOriginalTextFields
arguments.name: If non-empty, hash every word with this seed.

arguments.description: language The language of the input text. Default is "Any". Can be "Any", "English", "German", "French", "Spanish", "Portuguese", "Italian", "Dutch", or "Other". If "Any" or "Other" is selected, the script preprocess the entire input, no matter what its acutual language is. If a specific language is selected, the script filters out any other language from the output text. tokenizationMethod
arguments.name: Whether to add the original text fields to the output. Default is "false".
Tokenization method for text. Only required when the language argument is set to "Other". Can be "tokenizer", "byWords", or "byLetters". Default is "tokenizer".

outputs.description: The output file name. DBotPreProcessTextData.TextField The original text field inside the file.
outputs.name: DBotPreProcessTextData.Filename

outputs.description: DBotPreProcessTextData.TextFieldProcessed The processed text field inside the JSON file. DBotPreProcessTextData.FileFormat
